_note: Individual tool capabilities from all registered MCP servers and workspace scripts. Rebuilt by scripts/capability_index.py. Do not edit manually.

tools.name: Get Figma Design Context
tools.description: Read design context, components, and layout from a Figma file

tools.name: Get Figma Screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a Figma frame or component

tools.name: Write to Figma
tools.description: Write designs, components, or layouts into a Figma file

tools.name: Generate Figma Diagram
tools.description: Generate a diagram or FigJam content in Figma

tools.name: Generate Gamma Presentation
tools.description: Create an AI-powered presentation via Gamma cloud

tools.name: Generate from Gamma Template
tools.description: Create presentation using an existing Gamma template

tools.name: Read Gamma Content
tools.description: Read content of an existing Gamma presentation

tools.name: Gmail Authentication
tools.description: Authenticate with Gmail. Required before reading or sending email.

tools.name: Google Calendar Authentication
tools.description: Authenticate with Google Calendar for read/write access.

tools.name: Google Drive Authentication
tools.description: Authenticate with Google Drive for file access.

tools.name: Execute Code in IDE
tools.description: Execute code in the connected IDE (VS Code / JetBrains).

tools.name: Get IDE Diagnostics
tools.description: Read linting errors, type errors, and diagnostics from the IDE.

tools.name: Browser Navigate
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a URL.

tools.name: Browser Screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current browser view.

tools.name: Browser Network Request
tools.description: Make a network request via the browser context.

tools.name: Browser Run Code (Unsafe)
tools.description: Execute arbitrary JavaScript in the browser page context. Elevated risk.

tools.name: Browser Fill Form
tools.description: Fill and submit a form in the browser. May trigger server-side actions.

tools.name: Browser Click
tools.description: Click a page element. May trigger navigation or form submission.

tools.name: Vercel Authentication
tools.description: Authenticate with Vercel. Prerequisite for all deployment operations.

tools.name: Vercel Auth Completion
tools.description: Complete Vercel authentication flow.

tools.name: Rebuild Knowledge Index
tools.description: Rebuild KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.json from all knowledge entries.

tools.name: Knowledge Search
tools.description: Scored retrieval from KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.json. Tracks access_count.

tools.name: Knowledge Review Schedule
tools.description: Surface overdue knowledge entries by spaced repetition schedule.

tools.name: Knowledge Validator
tools.description: Validate entry structural quality, confidence calibration, and graph integrity.

tools.name: Knowledge QA Report
tools.description: Aggregate QA report: domain coverage, band distribution, calibration, dead links.

tools.name: Memory Index Builder
tools.description: Scan 7 typed memory directories and rebuild RETRIEVAL-INDEX.json.

tools.name: Database Initializer
tools.description: Initialize or verify the SQLite execution persistence database.

tools.name: Event Store
tools.description: Append and query workflow events in the SQLite event store.

tools.name: Checkpoint Manager
tools.description: Take, list, validate, and restore execution checkpoints.

tools.name: Recovery Engine
tools.description: Detect interrupted workflows, classify failures, generate recovery options.

tools.name: Artifact Tracker
tools.description: Register, verify, and list workflow output artifacts with hash validation.

tools.name: Timeline Viewer
tools.description: View execution timeline and operational journal from SQLite.

tools.name: Capability Register
tools.description: Register, suspend, reactivate, and retire MCP capabilities.

tools.name: Capability Index Builder
tools.description: Rebuild CAPABILITY-INDEX.json from MCP and tool registries.

tools.name: Capability Audit
tools.description: Read and analyze INVOCATION-LOG.jsonl for usage stats and anomalies.

tools.name: Memory Prune
tools.description: Generate prune manifests for memory entries by decay thresholds. Never auto-deletes.
